verses.text: Keima pumpi mahmah zong pawlpi upa hi-in, Khrih thuakna zong ka mit tawh mu-in, mailam hunah a hong kilang ding minthan'na zong a ngah dingpa ka hihna tawh note lakah a om pawlpi upate kiangah ka hong thum nop thu in

Pasian in note' khutsungah a hong piak tuuhonte hoihtakin na cing un la, utlopipi hiloin, Pasian' hong deih bangin utna lungsim takpi tawh na cing un. Sum ngahnopna bek tawh a sem hiloin utna lungsim tawh a semte na hi un
Note' kepdingin a hong kipia tuute, aana neihna tawh a cing hiloin tuute' etteh dingin a gamtate na hi un
Tuucingpipa hong pai ciangin a mual ngeilo minthan'na lukhu a hong pia ding hi

Tua mah bangin no khangnozaw deuhte in zong a khanghamte' thu na mang un. Lai Siangtho in, “Pasian in a kiphasak mite nial a, a kiniamkhiat mite a hehpih hi,” a cih mah bangin na vekpi-un kiniamkhiatna puan bangin silhin, khatlekhat na na kisepsak un
Pasian in ama hoihsak hun ciangin note hong laptoh theihna dingin a thahat Pasian' khutnuai-ah kiniamkhiatin na om un
Pasian in note hong kem ding ahih manin na lungkhamnate khempeuh uh ama kiang tun'pih un
Note pilvangin khua phawk un. Na gal uh ahi Dawimangpa, humpinelkai bangin a nektheih ding zongin vak kawikawi hi
Leitungah thu um dang khempeuh in zong note' thuak mah bangin a thuak ahihna thu thei un la, na upna uhah kipin Dawimangpa na nial un

Tawlkhat na thuak khit uh ciangin, Khrih tawh na kipawlna hangun tawntung minthan'na a ngah dingin note a hong sam, hehpihna kicingin a nei Pasian in note a cingtaakin hong bawl ding a, kipna, thahatna, bulkip kician hong pia ding hi
Tua Pasian in a tawntungin ukna vangliatna nei paisuak ta hen. Amen.

Thu upna sungah mi citakin ka ngaihsut Silas' huhna tawh hih lai tomno gelhin amah ka hong puasak hi. Hih thute pen Pasian' hong hehpihna taktak hi, ci-in teci pangin note ka hong hanthawn hi. Tua ahih manin hih thute-ah kipin om un
Note mah bangin Pasian in a teel, Babylon khua-a om pawlpi mite in hopihna kam hong khak uh a, ka tapa Marka in zong note hopihna kam mah hong khak hi
Khristian ki-itna tawh khatlekhat kinamin na kihopih un. Khrih thu um note khempeuh tungah nopsakna thupha hong tung ta hen.
